title: Joya Davis
compiled_truth: Joya Davis is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-02-09 to 2001-01-09), Joya Davis sent 19 and received 186 emails, totalling 205 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (14), [Kaye Ellis](people/kaye-ellis) (11), [Chaundra Woods](people/chaundra-woods) (9), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (9), [Alan Aronowitz](people/alan-aronowitz) (8).
